titleEn: Puro H 3000: Pöttinger’s first maize planter
titleZh: Pöttinger推出首款玉米播种机Puro H 3000，电动驱动与精准农业功能成亮点
summaryZh: 奥地利农机厂商Pöttinger首次进军玉米播种机市场，推出Puro H 3000气动播种机，支持最高8.5公里/小时作业速度，可选配电动驱动实现分区控制和变量播种。该机配备1300升肥料箱和68升种箱，通过Isobus全机控制。首批交付预计2026年底，2027年量产，后续还将推出更大机型。
translationZh:
奥地利农机厂商Pöttinger正在打造一款新型气动播种机——Puro H 3000。这是Pöttinger首次研发并销售用于玉米、甜菜等作物的播种机。

据制造商介绍，Puro H 3000是一款标准机型，旨在与竞争对手最主流的机器展开竞争。这是Pöttinger首次在推出高端机型之前，先开发一款坚固耐用的玉米播种机。

**可选电动驱动**

Puro H 3000玉米播种机适用于在犁耕地和有作物残茬的田地上以最高8.5公里/小时的前进速度进行播种。该机提供多种开沟盘，盘压最高可达180巴，并采用双圆盘开沟器。该玉米播种机可选配电动驱动，从而支持分区控制和变量播种。

该机还配备了一个容量为1300升的肥料箱。每个播种单元配有一个68升的种箱。整机完全通过Isobus进行控制。

**首批交付于2026年底**

Puro系列的首款机型是一款悬挂式6行机，作业宽度可达4.5米，行距最大75厘米。播种单元可向内滑动以便运输。据Pöttinger称，首批量产机型将于2026年底交付。全面量产将于2027年开始。目前尚未公布定价信息。

**更大机型将于2029年推出**

Pöttinger还在开发Puro系列中的更大版本，即Puro 5000和7000，预计将提供最多24个播种单元。这些机型预计分别要到2029年和2031年才能推出。

Puro 3000的更多变体也将在后续推出。2027年和2028年，Pöttinger计划推出多种刚性机型，最多可达12行。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了传统农机厂商向精准农业转型的典型路径，电动驱动、Isobus控制、变量播种等智能化功能对智慧种植业有参考价值，但内容与智慧畜牧（养殖业）的直接关联度较低，更适合大田作物领域读者关注。
contentFull:
Puro H 3000: Pöttinger’s first maize planter

 15-07 | Smart farming | News

Photo: Pöttinger

Austrian machinery manufacturer Pöttinger is building a new pneumatic planter, the Puro H 3000. This is the first time Pöttinger has developed and marketed a planter for crops including maize and sugar beet.

According to the manufacturer, the Puro H 3000 is a standard machine intended to compete with the most common machines offered by its competitors. For the first time, Pöttinger is developing a robust maize planter before launching a high-end machine.

Electric drive optional

The Puro H 3000 maize planter is suitable for sowing at forward speeds of up to 8.5 kilometres per hour, both on ploughed land and in fields with crop residues. Various discs are available, with disc pressure of up to 180 bar and double-disc coulters. The maize planter can optionally be equipped with electric drive. This also enables the use of section control and variable seed rates.

The machine also has a fertiliser hopper with a capacity of 1,300 litres. Each sowing unit has a 68-litre seed hopper. The machine is controlled entirely via Isobus.

First deliveries at the end of 2026

The first model in the Puro series is a mounted 6-row machine with a working width of up to 4.5 metres and row spacing of up to 75 centimetres. The sowing units slide inwards for transport. According to Pöttinger, the first production models will be delivered at the end of 2026. Full series production will begin in 2027. No pricing information has yet been announced.

Larger models from 2029

Pöttinger is also working on larger versions within the Puro series. These are the Puro 5000 and 7000, which are expected to be available with up to 24 sowing units. These machines are not expected to be launched until 2029 and 2031 respectively.

More variants of the Puro 3000 will also follow later. In 2027 and 2028, Pöttinger intends to introduce various rigid models with up to 12 rows.

 

 Lucas van de Weijer Future Farming robot expert

author: Lucas van de Weijer
contentHtml: Pöttinger brengt met de Puro H 3000 zijn eerste pneumatische maiszaaimachine op de markt, geschikt voor standaardtoepassingen en elektrische aandrijving.
